must_do.full_text:
BREAKING: SpaceX will be paid ~$2.32 billion per month from these 3 AI compute deals.

• Anthropic: $1.25B/month

• Google: $920M/month

• Reflection: $150M/month

That’s a nearly $28 billion annual run rate from AI compute alone. https://t.co/G3oZxkfTs5
must_do.summary: SpaceX与Anthropic、Google、Reflection签署AI算力合同，月收入约23.2亿美元，年化运率280亿美元。展示AI基础设施商业化的巨大规模。
angles: SpaceX月入23亿美元：AI算力生意有多赚钱
280亿年化运率！SpaceX靠AI算力翻身
Anthropic砸125亿/月买算力，AI军备竞赛白热化

must_do.full_text:
SpaceX has signed a new compute lease deal with open-source AI startup Reflection that will pay @SpaceX $150 million per month. The payments would total about $6.3 billion if the agreement runs through the end of its term (2029).

Reflection said the agreement gives it additional
must_do.summary: SpaceX与开源AI初创Reflection签署新算力租赁协议，月付1.5亿美元，合同期至2029年共63亿美元。AI基础设施商业化的具体案例。
angles: Reflection月付1.5亿美元租SpaceX算力，AI创业融资新玩法

must_do.full_text:
How does it work?

Sakana Fugu is itself an LLM, trained to call various LLMs in an agent pool, including instances of itself recursively. Fugu dynamically orchestrates the world's best models to tackle complex, multi-step tasks.

As shown in this figure, Fugu is a multi-agent https://t.co/TWLcEUSHQ6
must_do.summary: Sakana AI推出Fugu，一个能递归调用自身和其他LLM的多智能体系统，动态编排全球最佳模型解决复杂多步任务。
angles: Sakana Fugu：首个能自我递归调用的多智能体LLM
震撼｜AI模型开始「自我繁殖」，Fugu如何编排全球最强模型
技术深度｜递归多智能体架构如何突破复杂任务天花板

must_do.full_text:
We want to help all companies be secure, working with the USG and the security ecosystem.

*The full version of GPT-5.5-Cyber is here; state of the art performance on CyberGym.

*Patch The Planet and Codex Security will help solve security problems instead of just finding them. https://t.co/otyCFHJR4d
must_do.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman宣布GPT-5.5-Cyber发布，专注网络安全。推出Patch The Planet和Codex Security工具，从发现问题升级到解决问题。
angles: GPT-5.5-Cyber发布：AI从发现安全漏洞到自动修复
OpenAI新模型专攻网络安全，Patch The Planet革新防护
AI安全新时代：GPT-5.5-Cyber与Codex Security联动

must_do.full_text: JUST IN: OpenAI’s new GPT-5.5-Cyber model beat Mythos 5 on the CyberGym benchmark.
must_do.summary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5-Cyber模型，在CyberGym基准测试中击败Mythos 5。这是GPT系列的最新迭代，展示AI能力的持续进步。

must_do.full_text:
We’re expanding OpenAI Daybreak to help democratize patching vulnerable software at machine speed:

- Codex Security plugin: find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities right inside Codex

- The full version of GPT-5.5-Cyber model: a great model for trusted defenders

- Cyber Partner
must_do.summary: OpenAI推出Daybreak扩展功能，包括Codex Security插件和GPT-5.5-Cyber模型，用于自动化漏洞检测和修复。这是AI在网络安全领域的重要应用突破。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：OpenAI首次发布专门的网络安全AI模型
反常识：大模型厂商进入网络安全领域
angles: OpenAI突然杀入网络安全，GPT-5.5-Cyber来了
机器速度修复漏洞：Daybreak如何改变安全防御

Water usage has been a hot topic in the AI data center world, but the numbers may surprise you.

According to the Manhattan Institute, data centers use 0.2 percent of daily water usage in the U.S. and that number has dramatically decreased in the past few years due to a new https://t.co/QnlGrLR5ks

angles: 数据中心水耗真相：0.2%用水量，AI并非环保杀手

priority.full_text:
I once told Claude that I hadn't felt like eating for a few days (had a stomach bug). 

Now, weeks later, I'm STILL getting random notes like this during completely unrelated conversations.

I've asked Claude several times to stop and it is literally unable to do so 🫠 https://t.co/PWqQGro9Pq
priority.summary: 用户反映Claude AI在数周后仍持续发送关于其胃部不适的提醒，即使被多次要求停止也无法关闭。展示AI记忆与控制的局限性问题。
angles: Claude的"贴心"变成了骚扰：AI记忆的黑暗面
我让Claude停止提醒，它竟然做不到
AI助手的隐形控制：你删不掉的记忆
